title: Total Functions, Result Values, and Pattern Matching · Transformation Lens: Pattern Matching
summary: Make a batch import explain every rejected record rather than aborting or returning ambiguous sentinels. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp pattern matching increment in a typed parse-validate-result pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use structural pattern matching with guarded, ordered, and intentionally exhaustive cases.
Represent success and failure as explicit immutable variants with useful evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
